parameters: Pending
Shows transactions where purchase request was created without any of proceeding transactions performed yet.
Order Generated
Shows purchase requests converted to a purchase order.
Partial
Purchase request transactions whose purchase order was generated for fewer items or a lower quantity than requested.
Invoice Generated
Shows purchase requests with purchase invoice generated against them.
Short Closed
Displays purchase requests where the items ordered was not fully received, but the request was short-closed to mark it as completed.
Pending
Shows purchase orders raised with no further action taken yet.
Partial
Purchase order transactions whose invoice was generated for fewer items or a lower quantity than ordered.
Invoice Generated
Shows purchase orders with purchase invoice generated against them.
Short Closed
Displays purchase orders where the items ordered was not fully received, but the request was short-closed to mark it as completed.
Shows GRM transactions where goods are yet to be received. (GRM transaction is saved with Receipt date left blank).
Shows GRM transactions where goods have been received. (GRM transaction is saved with Receipt date filled).
User inputs number
Displays available physical stock in the godown that has remained idle for the entered number of days or more.
Shows GRM transactions that have been received and saved but do not have a purchase invoice generated against them.
Purchase Invoice Date
Displays a summary of purchase invoices generated within a selected date range ordered by purchase invoice date.
Supplier Invoice Date
Displays a summary of purchase invoices generated within a selected date range ordered by supplier invoice date.
Purchase Invoice Date
Shows an item-wise breakdown of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range ordered by purchase invoice date.
Supplier Invoice Date
Shows an item-wise breakdown of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range ordered by supplier invoice date.
Category
Shows a register of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range, grouped by item categories with sub-totals for quantities and net amounts.
Subcategory
Shows a register of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range, grouped by item subcategories with sub-totals for quantities and net amounts.
Supplier
Shows a register of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range, grouped by suppliers with sub-totals for quantities, net amounts, and additional charges.
Place
Shows a register of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range, grouped by supplier locations with sub-totals for quantities, net amounts, and additional charges.
Category Group
Shows a register summary of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range, grouped by item category groups with sub-totals for quantities and net amounts.
Brand
Shows a register of purchase invoices generated within the selected date range, grouped by item brands with sub-totals for quantities and net amounts.
Local
Filters the report to show transactions exclusively within the state, displaying zero IGST alongside domestic SGST and CGST values.
Inter-State
Filters the report to show inter-state transactions, displaying active IGST values with zero domestic tax values.
All
Filters the report to show both interstate and local transactions with respective values assigned to IGST or SGST and CGST values based on type of transaction.
Summary
Shows a summary of purchase invoices and returns listed by transaction, displaying vendor GSTINs, taxable amounts, and explicit tax breakdowns alongside additional charges and total amount.
Detail

Shows an item-wise breakdown of purchase invoices and returns listed by transaction, displaying HSN codes, individual rates, item quantities, and distinct tax information along with total amount and its aggregate for both purchase invoice and return.
Shows purchase invoices generated but have not had their final selling prices defined (pricing status partial or pending).
Shows a summary of goods returned to suppliers with reference to their original purchase invoices and total transaction amounts.
Shows item-wise breakdowns of goods returned to suppliers.
Shows purchase invoices alongside their corresponding returns to calculate the net purchase quantities and net transaction amounts.

option_name: Tax Wise Purchase Return Register Report

parameters: Summary
Shows a summary of purchase returns listed by transaction, displaying vendor GSTINs, taxable amounts, and explicit tax breakdowns alongside additional charges.
Detailed
Shows an item-wise breakdown of purchase returns listed by transaction, displaying HSN codes, individual rates, return quantities, and distinct tax percentages.
Credit
Shows a detailed list of credit note transactions generated within the selected date range.
Debit
Shows a detailed list of debit note transactions generated within the selected date range.
Customer
Filters transaction list of credit / debit note where party type is customer.
Supplier
Filters transaction list of credit / debit note where party type is supplier.
Request
Filters transaction list of credit / debit note where reason for transaction is Damage.
Exchange
Filters transaction list of credit / debit note where reason for transaction is Exchange.
Category-wise
Shows a consolidated register of credit and debit notes grouped by item categories with sub-totals for taxable, tax, and total amounts.
Party-wise
Shows a consolidated register of credit and debit notes grouped by individual supplier names with sub-totals for taxable, tax, and total amounts.
Credit
Filters the transaction list to show only credit notes.
Debit
Filters the transaction list to show only debit notes.
User input
Filters the transaction list to show transactions from exclusively the selected place.
Debit
Shows a list of cancelled debit note transactions, displaying their cancellation numbers and original document references alongside total amount values.
Credit
Shows a list of cancelled credit note transactions, displaying their cancellation numbers and original document references alongside total amount values.
User input
Filters the transaction list to show transactions from exclusively the selected place.
User input
Filters the transaction list to show transactions from exclusively the selected supplier.
Submitted
Not Submitted
Consumption/Capital Purchase
Shows GSTR-2 submitted details transactions whose transaction type is consumption/capital purchase, displaying supplier GSTINs, invoice
